bootstrap.name: Successful Bootstrapping
bootstrap.description: Low complexity (walking 15min/day). M decays but B continues firing due to low threshold. H reaches self-sustaining level.

false_hope.name: False Hope Limit Cycle
false_hope.description: New Year's resolution to do intense 6-day/week gym program. High C, periodic shocks re-inject M without H accumulation.

indulgence.name: Indulgence Trap
indulgence.description: Person watches fitness content, plans routines, fantasizes about results, but rarely acts. M leaks through phantom reward.

complexity_overshoot.name: Complexity Overshoot
complexity_overshoot.description: Hired a trainer, bought meal prep containers, signed up for 5am CrossFit. C too high for initial M.

post_shock.name: Post-Shock Dropout
post_shock.description: Doctor says cholesterol is dangerous. Immediate behavior change attempt with moderate complexity.

context_disruption.name: Context Disruption & Recovery
context_disruption.description: Person with established gym habit moves to new city. H drops but recovers faster than initial formation due to I.

what_the_hell.name: What-the-Hell Effect
what_the_hell.description: Strict diet plan. One perceived violation (birthday cake) triggers E spike and catastrophic M drop.

identity_stable.name: Identity-Stabilized Maintenance
identity_stable.description: 10-year runner with strong exercise identity. Survives injury and stress because I keeps M above zero and A high.

impl_intention.name: Implementation Intention Boost
impl_intention.description: Person forms specific if-then plan: 'When I get home from work, I put on running shoes.' Reduces effective threshold.

stress_relapse.name: Stress-Induced Relapse
stress_relapse.description: Early habit former (low H) hit by major stressor. Stress depletes M and H is too low to sustain behavior alone.

reward_habituation.name: Reward Habituation
reward_habituation.description: Initial excitement of new gym fades as reward becomes fully predicted. M sustained only if H grows fast enough.
